rows.label: qev055901_MSG0001
rows.name:
This phenomenon is far too bizarre...
We can't just leave this alone...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055901_MSG0002
rows.name:
Those things were hardly supposed
to exist in the Black Steel
Continent at all, but...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055901_JNK0010
rows.name: Interest[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055901_SEL0011
rows.name: Ask him for details about the bizarre phenomenon.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055901_JNK0020
rows.name: Question[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055901_SEL0021
rows.name: Ask what he means by "those things."[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055901_MSG0003
rows.name:
The native creature Nalki has been
multiplying in the Black Steel Continent.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055901_MSG0004
rows.name:
Even though they are supposed
to be a species with an extremely
low reproduction rate...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055901_MSG0005
rows.name:
The Nalki are creatures with
quite a ferocious nature.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055901_MSG0006
rows.name:
If they continue to multiply at this rate, the
activities of BLADE in the Black Steel Continent
will become completely unmanageable.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055901_MSG0007
rows.name:
I'm talking about the native creature
Nalki in the Black Steel Continent.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055901_MSG0008
rows.name:
They're multiplying abnormally. Even though they are
supposed to be a species with an extremely low
reproduction rate... Don't you think that's strange?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055901_MSG0009
rows.name:
The Nalki are creatures with
quite a ferocious nature.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055901_MSG0010
rows.name:
If they continue to multiply at this
rate, the activities of BLADE will
become completely unmanageable.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055901_MSG0011
rows.name:
I want you to investigate
what is happening.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055901_MSG0012
rows.name:
First, could you defeat one and
bring me a biological sample?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055901_MSG0013
rows.name:
Come back to NLA as soon as you have
the sample. I'm counting on you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055901_MSG0014
rows.name:
Return to NLA as soon as
you've defeated a Nalki and
obtained a biological sample.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055901_MSG0015
rows.name:
I'd like to say good work...
but something is wrong.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055901_MSG0016
rows.name:
According to Frontier Net data, the
number of Nalki has increased by two.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055901_MSG0017
rows.name:
Even though you were supposed
to have defeated one... What
is the meaning of this?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055901_JNK0030
rows.name: Interest[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055901_SEL0031
rows.name: Say you should obtain more Nalki biological samples to investigate further.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055901_JNK0040
rows.name: Question[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055901_SEL0041
rows.name: Ask if there must be a reason for the Nalki multiplying.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055901_MSG0018
rows.name:
You're right. No matter how you look at it,
this is a bizarre situation... There is no
way Nalki should multiply this quickly.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055901_MSG0019
rows.name:
We'll definitely need more
Nalki biological samples to
get to the bottom of the cause.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055901_MSG0020
rows.name:
It truly is a bizarre phenomenon...
There is no way Nalki should
multiply this quickly.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055901_MSG0021
rows.name:
We'll need more Nalki biological samples
to get to the bottom of this cause.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055901_MSG0022
rows.name:
Head to the Black Steel Continent once more,
defeat them, and acquire biological samples.
I need samples from two of them this time.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055901_MSG0023
rows.name:
Defeat Nalki, acquire biological samples
from two of them, and return to NLA.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055901_MSG0024
rows.name:
What on earth! This
shouldn't be possible![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055901_MSG0025
rows.name:
The Nalki are multiplying again!
What is going on? This time,
four more have spawned...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055901_JNK0050
rows.name: Interest[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055901_SEL0051
rows.name: Ask for details about the analysis results so far.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055901_JNK0060
rows.name: Question[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055901_SEL0061
rows.name: Ask if the Nalki might have a hidden life cycle.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055901_MSG0026
rows.name:
It seems a change is occurring within
the Nalki's bloodstream... But I haven't
grasped the specific details yet.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055901_MSG0027
rows.name:
It's a possibility, but... even if
that were the case, this shouldn't
happen without some sort of trigger.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055901_MSG0028
rows.name:
An organism that continuously
multiplies... It resembles something...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055901_MSG0029
rows.name:
[ST:playername ]... Could you bring me biological
samples from four of them this time?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055901_MSG0030
rows.name:
This phenomenon is more than I can handle
alone. While you're in the Black Steel
Continent, I'll try asking for a helper.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055901_MSG0031
rows.name: Let's both do our best![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055901_MSG0032
rows.name:
Bring me biological samples from
four Nalki. I know it's a lot of
work, but I'm counting on you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055901_MSG0033
rows.name:
It seems the capabilities of Earthlings alone
won't be enough to solve this bizarre phenomenon,
so I decided to ask an Orphean for cooperation.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055901_MSG0034
rows.name:
I suppose Earthlings would call
this a "bad premonition."[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055901_MSG0035
rows.name:
After hearing from Julius, I am
analyzing the Nalki's biology, but...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055901_MSG0036
rows.name:
This may become an event that
shakes the very significance of
existence for us Orpheans...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055901_MSG0037
rows.name:
I must conduct the analysis
carefully... very carefully. I
need a few more biological samples.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055901_MSG0038
rows.name:
The Nalki are continuing to multiply as
usual. What on earth is happening...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055901_MSG0039
rows.name:
I want you to obtain biological
samples from six more Nalki.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055901_MSG0040
rows.name:
That should allow us to reach a
conclusion. I only hope it will
not be an undesirable one...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055901_JNK0070
rows.name: Interest[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055901_SEL0071
rows.name: Ask about the conclusion.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055901_JNK0080
rows.name: Question[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055901_SEL0081
rows.name: Ask what would be undesirable.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055901_MSG0041
rows.name:
It is still purely hypothetical
at this point. For now... I do
not wish to discuss it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055901_MSG0042
rows.name:
It seems you Orpheans can take illogical
actions like putting off things you
don't want to deal with too, huh.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055901_MSG0043
rows.name:
That is... I do not wish to discuss it
right now. Just thinking about it seems
to throw my mind into confusion.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055901_MSG0044
rows.name:
It seems you Orpheans have
feelings like that too.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055901_MSG0045
rows.name:
In any case, to uncover this mystery,
please bring me biological samples
from six Nalki this time.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055901_MSG0046
rows.name:
I believe this will be the last
time. I am counting on you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055901_MSG0047
rows.name:
To uncover this mystery, please bring
me biological samples from six Nalki.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055901_MSG0048
rows.name:
Does it look like you've reached
a conclusion, Han'boiton?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055901_MSG0049
rows.name:
...And, are the Nalki still
continuing to multiply?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055901_MSG0050
rows.name: Yeah, they're increasing.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055901_MSG0051
rows.name:
Just as I suspected. I have never
experienced this feeling before. Is
this what you would call... gloomy?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055901_MSG0052
rows.name:
The conclusion is clear from the analysis
results of the biological samples and the
fact that the Nalki are still multiplying.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055901_MSG0053
rows.name:
It is a conclusion I did
not want to be possible...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055901_JNK0090
rows.name: Interest[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055901_SEL0091
rows.name: Ask for details about the conclusion.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055901_JNK0100
rows.name: Question[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055901_SEL0101
rows.name: Ask what he is so surprised about.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055901_MSG0054
rows.name:
The Ovah that we revere... It exists
within the bodies of the Nalki...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055901_MSG0055
rows.name:
The Ovah that we revere... It
exists within those primitive
lifeforms, the Nalki...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055901_MSG0056
rows.name: This is truly astonishing...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055901_MSG0057
rows.name: This Ovah you're talking about is...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055901_MSG0058
rows.name:
The Ovah is a virus that exists within
our bodies... We must formulate
countermeasures for this immediately...[ST:wait ]
